title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 08 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/01/2026
Dalian iron ore futures retreated from recent highs today, exhibiting a weak and volatile trend. The benchmarkI2605 contract closed at 813 RMB/ton, representing a decline of 0.37% from the previous trading session. In the physical market, prices dropped by 8-15 RMB/ton.
